title: Creochiton furfuracea
taxonomy: Creochiton furfuracea is classified within the family Melastomataceae and is native to Australia. This species is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the genus Creochiton. The family Melastomataceae, to which Creochiton furfuracea belongs, is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is composed of approximately 175 genera, including Creochiton. The classification of Creochiton furfuracea reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
